title: STAR - Cognizant Healthcare Document Intelligence
content:
Project: Cognizant Healthcare Document Intelligence Pipeline

Situation:
- Healthcare document workflows required large-scale processing with strong quality and compliance requirements.
- Inputs included scanned or semi-structured records, making extraction and classification challenging.

Task:
- Deliver a scalable OCR plus NLP system to classify documents and extract structured information for downstream operations.

Action:
- Implemented OCR-driven preprocessing and domain-adapted NLP stages for medical document understanding.
- Designed classification and extraction steps with validation checks for data quality and consistency.
- Built deployment and integration patterns suitable for high-volume operational environments.
- Coordinated technical delivery in cross-functional, compliance-sensitive contexts.

Result:
- Source-reported improvement in processing efficiency and extraction quality for healthcare workflows.
- Demonstrated ability to deliver reliable ML systems in regulated domains.
